title: Navigate from workspace quick actions to directions
description: Verifies a user can use a workspace quick action to reach Directions and the Directions page loads successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace
Click the quick action to manage directions
Verify the user lands on the directions page

title: View health score and active bets from Mission Control
description: This test verifies the Mission Control dashboard loads with a visible health visualization and a list of active bets with statuses.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/mission-control
Verify a health visualization and a numeric health score are displayed
Verify a list of active bets with status indicators is displayed

title: Approve a pending intervention and see status/list update after polling
description: This test verifies approving an intervention marks it approved/queued and the pending list updates after the polling interval.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/inbox
Open a pending intervention from the list
Scroll to the intervention decision controls
Approve the intervention
Wait for 9 seconds
Verify the intervention is shown as approved or queued and is no longer shown as pending

title: Navigate from workspace quick actions to inbox
description: Verifies a user can use a workspace quick action to reach the Inbox and the Inbox page loads successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace
Click the quick action to review pending approvals
Verify the user lands on the inbox page

title: Open Inbox and review pending interventions list
description: This test verifies the Inbox page loads and shows pending interventions requiring approval when available or an empty state when none exist.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/inbox
Verify either a list of pending interventions is displayed or an empty state is displayed

title: Reject a pending intervention and see it returned to draft with list update after polling
description: This test verifies rejecting an intervention marks it rejected/returned to draft and the pending list updates after the polling interval.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/inbox
Open a pending intervention from the list
Scroll to the intervention decision controls
Reject the intervention
Wait for 9 seconds
Verify the intervention is shown as rejected or returned to draft and is no longer shown as pending

title: Workspace loads with overview content and quick actions available
description: Verifies the Workspace overview loads and presents entry points to core workflows.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace
Verify the workspace overview content is displayed
Verify quick actions are displayed

title: Review proposed direction evidence and promote to declared bet with hypothesis
description: Verifies a user can open a proposed direction, review summary/evidence, promote it by adding a hypothesis, and see it appear as an active bet.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/directions
Trigger a scan of connected issue data
Open a proposed direction from the results
Scroll to view the direction's evidence section
Start promoting the proposed direction to a bet
Fill a sufficiently detailed hypothesis into the hypothesis field
Submit the promotion to create a declared bet
Verify the promoted direction now appears among active bets

title: Trigger signal discovery scan and view proposed directions list
description: Verifies a user can trigger a scan, sees a detecting/loading status, and then sees a list area for proposed directions rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/directions
Trigger a scan of connected issue data
Verify a detecting or loading status is visible
Verify proposed directions results are displayed

title: Declare new strategic bet via modal and see it listed as active
description: Verifies a user can declare a new bet by completing required fields and sees the new bet listed among active bets.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/directions
Start declaring a new strategic bet
Fill a target segment into the target segment field
Fill a problem statement into the problem statement field
Fill a sufficiently detailed hypothesis into the hypothesis field
Fill measurable success metrics into the success metrics field
Submit the bet form
Verify the new bet appears among active bets

title: Drill into an active bet to review summary and intervention activity
description: This test verifies a user can select an active bet and see its summary and recent intervention activity details.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/mission-control
Select an active bet from the active bets list
Verify the selected bet’s summary information is displayed
Verify recent intervention activity for the selected bet is displayed

title: Promote proposed direction blocked until hypothesis is provided
description: Verifies promoting a proposed direction without a hypothesis shows validation, and after adding a hypothesis the promotion succeeds and creates an active bet.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/directions
Trigger a scan of connected issue data
Open a proposed direction from the results
Start promoting the proposed direction to a bet
Submit the promotion without filling a hypothesis
Verify a hypothesis validation error is visible
Fill a sufficiently detailed hypothesis into the hypothesis field
Submit the promotion to create a declared bet
Verify the promoted direction now appears among active bets

title: Mission Control remains usable during stale-to-fresh polling refresh
description: This test verifies Mission Control content remains visible and updates without duplicating sections during an 8s polling refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/mission-control
Wait for the dashboard content to load
Wait for 9 seconds
Verify the health score and active bets are still displayed

title: Inbox remains stable during polling refresh without duplicate actions
description: This test verifies the Inbox does not show duplicated intervention items or duplicated decision controls after a polling refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/inbox
Wait for the pending interventions content to load
Wait for 9 seconds
Verify the pending interventions view remains stable and does not show duplicated items or duplicated decision controls

title: Hypothesis too brief shows validation and allows resubmission
description: Verifies the bet declaration form blocks submission for an overly brief hypothesis and succeeds after the hypothesis is expanded.

steps.description: Navigate to /workspace/directions
Start declaring a new strategic bet
Fill a target segment into the target segment field
Fill a problem statement into the problem statement field
Fill a very short hypothesis into the hypothesis field
Fill measurable success metrics into the success metrics field
Submit the bet form
Verify a hypothesis validation error is visible
Update the hypothesis with more detail
Submit the bet form
Verify the new bet appears among active bets
